h1: Moth Control in NYC — Protecting Clothes, Pantries, and Peace of Mind
heroParagraph: Moth damage in NYC apartments is almost always found after the fact — holes in wool sweaters, webbing in pantry goods, larvae in rugs. Two distinct species cause most moth problems: clothes moths attack natural fibers including wool, cashmere, silk, and fur stored in closets and drawers; pantry moths infest dry goods including grains, flour, cereals, nuts, and spices. Treatment requires correctly identifying the species, eliminating the source, and treating all infested areas.
